findings.finding: All 9 TDD Anchor test cases from the task spec are covered: debit_success, debit_exact, debit_insufficient, debit_rollback, cold_start, deposit_negative, deposit_zero, balance_warning, tx_initiated_by. Additionally 3 extra tests: balance_no_warning, deposit_success, deposit_non_numeric.
findings.reason: Full TDD Anchor coverage plus extra edge cases.

findings.finding: Mock file system (createMockFs) properly deep-clones data on read/write, preventing mutation between test steps. Race condition test uses custom read/write functions to simulate concurrent writes.
findings.reason: Mock strategy is minimal and appropriate. Each test is independent with its own mock state.

findings.finding: Litmus test check: removing core debit logic (balance subtraction) would cause debit_success and debit_exact to fail. Removing pre-check would cause debit_insufficient to pass incorrectly but debit would still throw on rollback check — however the error code would be 409 not 402, so the test would fail. Tests are meaningful.
findings.reason: Tests verify behavior (status codes, balance values, transaction records), not implementation details.

findings.finding: 48 assertions total, 0 failures. Test results: escrow_debit_success (8), escrow_debit_exact (4), escrow_debit_insufficient (4), escrow_debit_rollback (5), escrow_cold_start (4), escrow_deposit_negative (3), escrow_deposit_zero (2), escrow_balance_warning (2), escrow_balance_no_warning (2), escrow_tx_initiated_by (6), escrow_deposit_success (7), escrow_deposit_non_numeric (1).
findings.reason: All tests pass. No regression in test_sdk_methods.js (85 passed) or test_bounty_campaigns.js (48 passed).

summary: All TDD Anchor test cases covered. Tests are meaningful, independent, and properly isolated with mock file system. 48 assertions pass. No regressions in existing test suites.
